items.name: Temporal
items.source_story_title: SQLite is all you need for durable workflows
items.summary: Temporal — durable workflow engine for retries and orchestration.
items.why_included: A commenter gave hands-on praise and explicitly recommended it for workflow retries and task orchestration.
items.evidence: One commenter said they started setting up workflows with Temporal, liked the lightweight local setup, and said it made API retries and organizing tasks simple.

items.name: TV Explorer
items.source_story_title: Show HN: TV Explorer. Adding advanced UI to free online TV
items.summary: TV Explorer — advanced browser UI for free online TV channels.
items.why_included: Commenters gave it direct usage praise and compared it favorably to competing TV sites.
items.evidence: HN commenters said they were watching Korean and Mongolian channels with it, called it awesome, and one said they liked it more than tv.garden.

items.name: Framework 12
items.source_story_title: It's hard to justify buying a Framework 12
items.summary: Framework 12 — repairable 12-inch convertible laptop with stylus support.
items.why_included: The thread contained concrete buyer feedback on portability and screen quality, not just abstract brand talk.
items.evidence: Commenters called the Framework 12 a really nice portable form factor, while warning that its display could be a weak point.

items.name: tuicr
items.source_story_title: We should be more tired than the model
items.summary: tuicr — terminal code-review TUI with vim keybindings.
items.why_included: A commenter described using it for agent code reviews and said they were enjoying it.
items.evidence: One commenter said they had been using tuicr for agent code reviews and had been enjoying the workflow.

items.name: jdt.ls
items.source_story_title: We should be more tired than the model
items.summary: jdt.ls — Java language server for refactors and editor automation.
items.why_included: The comment was a concrete recommendation from someone using it for Java refactors.
items.evidence: A commenter said Java has very good refactor support, that they use jdt.ls, and that they wished similar refactors existed in more languages.

items.name: YubiKey
items.source_story_title: It's hard to justify buying a Framework 12
items.summary: YubiKey — hardware security key that replaces a lot of laptop auth friction.
items.why_included: The discussion used it as a practical replacement for the laptop’s touch ID.
items.evidence: A commenter said the Framework 12’s touch ID was easily replaced with a YubiKey and that everything else just worked.

items.name: Rclone
items.summary: Rclone — command-line cloud sync tool for remotes and backups.
items.why_included: A commenter described a concrete personal workflow built around it for encrypted storage.
items.evidence: One commenter said they use Rclone to keep repos encrypted on S3 via a file-based remote.

items.name: Assassin's Creed Odyssey
items.source_story_title: High Density Living, 2000 Years Ago: Inside the Roman Apartment Building
items.summary: Assassin's Creed Odyssey — Ancient Greece game praised as a teaching tool.
items.why_included: The comment praised it for immersion and for helping teach classical history.
items.evidence: A commenter said the game has a feature like the article’s example and that it works really well as a teaching tool with excellent immersion.
